env HOME=${WORK}

[linux] env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${HOME}/.config
[linux] env XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=${HOME}/runtime
[linux] mkdir ${XDG_CONFIG_HOME}/dex
[linux] mkdir ${XDG_RUNTIME_DIR}
[linux] mv config.toml ${HOME}/.config/dex/config.toml

[darwin] mkdir ${HOME}'/Library/Application Support/dex'
[darwin] mv config.toml ${HOME}'/Library/Application Support/dex/config.toml'

env GOBIN=${WORK}/bin
env PATH=${GOBIN}:${PATH}
cd ${PKG_ROOT}
go install ./cmd/rest
cd ${WORK}

dex -log debug -lines &dex&
sleep 1s

# Write a value to the state store as rest (no "from" override).
GET http://localhost:7070/
stdout '^ok$'

# Read it back as rest (no "from" override).
GET http://localhost:7071/
cmp stdout want_read.txt

# Read with "from" override to "allowed": permitted by allow_forward
# rule. The get succeeds at the identity gate but returns not-found
# because nothing was written under the "allowed" identity.
GET http://localhost:7072/
stdout '^null$'

# Read with "from" override to "denied": no matching allow_forward
# rule. The kernel rejects the call before it reaches the store.
GET http://localhost:7073/
stdout '^null$'

kill -INT dex
wait dex

# The allowed forward should not trigger an identity mismatch.
! stderr '"identity mismatch".*"allowed"'

# The denied forward should trigger an identity mismatch.
stderr '"identity mismatch".*"denied"'

-- config.toml --
[kernel]
device = []
network = "tcp"

[[kernel.allow_forward]]
origin = "rest"
identity = "allowed"
target = "kernel"
method = "get"

[module.rest]
path = "rest"
log_mode = "log"
log_level = "debug"
log_add_source = true

[module.rest.options.server.writer]
addr = "localhost:7070"
request = """
{
	"method": "set",
	"params": {"item": "test_key", "value": b"test_value"}
}
"""
response = """
"ok"
"""

[module.rest.options.server.reader]
addr = "localhost:7071"
request = """
{
	"method": "get",
	"params": {"item": "test_key"}
}
"""
response = """
response.body
"""

[module.rest.options.server.allowed_reader]
addr = "localhost:7072"
request = """
{
	"method": "get",
	"params": {"item": "test_key"},
	"from": {"module": "allowed"}
}
"""
response = """
response.body
"""

[module.rest.options.server.denied_reader]
addr = "localhost:7073"
request = """
{
	"method": "get",
	"params": {"item": "test_key"},
	"from": {"module": "denied"}
}
"""
response = """
response.body
"""

-- want_read.txt --
{"value":"dGVzdF92YWx1ZQ=="}
